spika-neobrutal-frontend: Default implementation skill for building landing pages, portfolios, editorial pages, and marketing surfaces in the Spika-style Neo-brutalist language.
spika-neobrutal-redesign: Audit-first migration skill for converting existing projects to Spika Neo-brutal tokens, primitives, sections, and interactions.
spika-neobrutal-gpt: Strict GPT and Codex variant with mandatory design plan, token-first implementation, complete output, and hard bans on generic SaaS defaults.
spika-neobrutal-image-to-code: Image-first workflow for generating or analyzing references, extracting visual details, and implementing matching code.
spika-neobrutal-imagegen-web: Image-generation-only skill for horizontal web comps in the Spika Neo-brutal style.
spika-neobrutal-imagegen-mobile: Image-generation-only skill for mobile screens and flows in the Spika Neo-brutal style.
spika-neobrutal-brandkit: Image-generation-only skill for hard-border brand boards, logo systems, color tokens, typography, and UI applications.
spika-neobrutal-stitch: Google Stitch-compatible semantic design-system generator for Spika Neo-brutal DESIGN.md output.
complete-output-enforcement: Utility skill that prevents placeholder, omitted, or truncated code output.
